member.name: T:MicroResult.Error
member.summary: Represents an error with a code and message.

member.name: P:MicroResult.Error.Code
member.summary: Gets the machine-readable error code.

member.name: P:MicroResult.Error.Message
member.summary: Gets the human-readable error message.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Error.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new error value.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Error.ToString
member.summary: Returns the error as a readable string.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Error.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether this error equals another object.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Error.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this error.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Error.op_Equality(MicroResult.Error,MicroResult.Error)
member.summary: Compares two errors for equality.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Error.op_Inequality(MicroResult.Error,MicroResult.Error)
member.summary: Compares two errors for inequality.

member.name: T:MicroResult.Result`1
member.summary: A lightweight, zero-allocation Result type for functional error handling.

member.name: P:MicroResult.Result`1.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the result represents success.

member.name: P:MicroResult.Result`1.IsFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the result represents failure.

member.name: P:MicroResult.Result`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the successful value.
member.exception: Thrown when the result is a failure.

member.name: P:MicroResult.Result`1.Error
member.summary: Gets the error value.
member.exception: Thrown when the result is a success.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Success(`0)
member.summary: Creates a successful result with the given value.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Failure(MicroResult.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed result with the given error.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.op_Implicit(`0)~MicroResult.Result{`0}
member.summary: Implicit conversion from T to Result{T} (success).

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.op_Implicit(MicroResult.Error)~MicroResult.Result{`0}
member.summary: Implicit conversion from Error to Result{T} (failure).

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Match``1(System.Func{`0,``0},System.Func{MicroResult.Error,``0})
member.summary: Matches on success or failure, returning a result of TResult type.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Map``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Transforms the value if success, preserves failure.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Bind``1(System.Func{`0,MicroResult.Result{``0}})
member.summary: Chains operations that return Result{TResult}.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Ensure(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean},MicroResult.Error)
member.summary: Applies a predicate check; if fails, returns the given error.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether this result equals another object.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this result.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.op_Equality(MicroResult.Result{`0},MicroResult.Result{`0})
member.summary: Compares two results for equality.

member.name: M:MicroResult.Result`1.op_Inequality(MicroResult.Result{`0},MicroResult.Result{`0})
member.summary: Compares two results for inequality.

member.name: T:MicroResult.ResultExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for Result{T}.

member.name: M:MicroResult.ResultExtensions.Tap``1(MicroResult.Result{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Executes an action on the value if success, then returns the original result.

member.name: M:MicroResult.ResultExtensions.OnFailure``1(MicroResult.Result{``0},System.Action{MicroResult.Error})
member.summary: Executes an action on the error if failure, then returns the original result.

member.name: M:MicroResult.ResultExtensions.Select``2(MicroResult.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Transforms a Result{T} to a Result{TResult} using a transformation function.

member.name: M:MicroResult.ResultExtensions.SelectMany``2(MicroResult.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,MicroResult.Result{``1}})
member.summary: Chains Results together (monadic bind).
